vulnerability: CRITICAL - SRP Salt Leak via Session Swap (Zero Captcha)
impact: Attacker can obtain any victim SRP salt + server public value WITHOUT captcha, enabling offline dictionary attacks on passwords. Combined with MFA bypass = full fund drain.

step_1_attacker_session.note: NO CAPTCHA due to TG client spoof

step_2_swap_to_victim.note: Server returns VICTIM salt+srp_B using ATTACKER session! No captcha at any step!

attack_chain: 2. POST /account/login_v3 with session_id + victim email → victim SRP salt + srp_B LEAKED
3. Offline dictionary attack: salt + 10M password list → crack in minutes on GPU
root_cause: Server trusts client_id parameter to skip captcha (TG spoof)
Server does NOT validate session ownership - attacker session used for victim SRP exchange
SRP salt exposed without any verification of account ownership
Combined with MFA bypass: password crack = instant fund theft

impact_analysis.offline_cracking: With salt + srp_B, attacker can test millions of passwords offline without hitting rate limit
impact_analysis.not_brute_force: This is NOT 240 attempts/day. This is unlimited offline GPU cracking.
impact_analysis.common_passwords: Top 10M passwords cracked in <10 minutes on modern GPU
impact_analysis.combined_with_mfa_bypass: Cracked password + MFA bypass = complete fund drain
